caption: Donated handmade crocheted bags and toys to FESCO (Family Emergency Shelter Coalition). FESCO does incredible work in Alameda County supporting families as they transition from housing crises to stability.

We are on a mission to bring comfort, warmth, and joy to those who need it most through crocheting and knitting. We donate these handmade items to local organizations, shelters, and hospitals, along with other necessities they need like diapers, toys, and formula. We hope these small gifts bring big smiles to people’s faces!
